title: Harris Essentials Paint Brush | Walls & Ceilings | DIY | 3"
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: 3" paint brush for precise painting on edges, corners, and smaller areas
Soft synthetic filament brush head retains water-based paint for an even flow
Ideal for cutting in around plug sockets, light switches, and skirting boards
Comfortable and easy-grip handle for long decorating sessions
Easy to clean by rinsing under the tap after painting
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! 3" Harris Essentials Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush What's included? 1 x 3" Harris Essentials Brush For controlled paint application along edges and corners This Harris paint brush gives you a good finish when painting walls and ceilings with emulsion and water based paint. For a good paint finish... Combine this brush with the other Harris paint brushes and paint rollers in the Essentials range for a good paint finish. This wall & ceiling brush is ideal for those long decorating sessions. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range.
